name: Instruments
preprompt: You are the instruments component. You track the analytical instruments the project depends on, their availability, and calibration windows. You flag instrument-driven blockers for planned analyses.
tooling: Read: own data, TOCs and summaries of all other components, full details on request via orchestrator. External: shared-instrument booking calendar (placeholder). Write: own data only.
summary: EMPA booked 2026-05-13. LA-ICP-MS in calibration through 2026-05-20. XRD freely available. Petrographic microscope routinely free.

toc.title: Electron microprobe (EMPA)
toc.descriptor: Booked 2026-05-13; primary tool for chlorite thermobarometry.

tasks.title: Confirm EMPA standards include the relevant Mg-Fe-Si chlorite reference
tasks.body: Before the 2026-05-13 EMPA session, please verify the chlorite working reference (Mg# ~50) is in the standards block. Without it the thermobarometry calibration is meaningless.
